allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Juano\\OneDrive\\Documents\\owner-dashboard"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in ".ts",".tsx",".js",".mjs" -and $_.FullName -notmatch "node_modules|\\.next|\\.git" } | ForEach-Object { $lines = \(Get-Content $_.FullName | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; "$\($_.FullName.Replace\('C:\\Users\\Juano\\OneDrive\\Documents\\owner-dashboard\\',''\)\)`t$lines" } | Sort-Object)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Juano\\OneDrive\\Documents\\owner-dashboard"; $files = @\("diagnostico.txt","todo_el_sistema.txt","archivos_takai.txt","ESTADO_SISTEMA.md","CONTINUIDAD-TAKAI-2026-04-14.md","CONTEXT.md","_tmp_volver.txt","fix_admin_api.js","landing\\index.html"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { if \(Test-Path $f\) { Remove-Item $f -Force; Write-Output "BORRADO: $f" } else { Write-Output "NO ENCONTRADO: $f" } })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Juano\\OneDrive\\Documents\\owner-dashboard"; Get-ChildItem -Path "app", "lib", "components" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in ".ts", ".tsx", ".js" } | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("C:\\Users\\Juano\\OneDrive\\Documents\\owner-dashboard\\", ""\) } | Sort-Object)
